# Study Characteristics {.unnumbered}

```{r}
#| include: false
for (p in c("_common.R", "../_common.R", "book/_common.R")) if (file.exists(p)) { source(p); break }
```

::: infobox
**Table 1** presents the characteristics of all 18 intervention arms (14 unique studies) included in the meta-analysis. Studies are listed in order of intervention ID. Age and BMI are reported as mean ± SD where available; NA indicates not reported.
:::

```{r study-characteristics-table}
#| label: tbl-study-characteristics
#| tbl-cap: "*Characteristics of included intervention arms (N = 18 arms from 14 studies). Age and BMI are mean ± SD where available; NA = not reported. VO2max units vary by study: l/min or ml/kg/min as reported. CHO = carbohydrate; CPET = cardiopulmonary exercise test; IPAH = idiopathic pulmonary arterial hypertension; YYRL1 = Yo-Yo intermittent recovery level 1.*"
#| echo: false

library(knitr)

study_chars <- data.frame(
  ID = 1:18,
  Study = c(
    "Ibfelt et al. (2002)",
    "Kostrzewa-Nowak & Nowak (2018)a",
    "Kostrzewa-Nowak & Nowak (2018)b",
    "Kostrzewa-Nowak et al. (2019)",
    "Kostrzewa-Nowak & Nowak (2020a)a",
    "Kostrzewa-Nowak & Nowak (2020a)b",
    "Kostrzewa-Nowak & Nowak (2020b)a",
    "Kostrzewa-Nowak & Nowak (2020b)b",
    "Kostrzewa-Nowak & Nowak (2020b)c",
    "Kostrzewa-Nowak & Nowak (2020b)d",
    "Kostrzewa-Nowak & Nowak (2020b)e",
    "Steensberg et al. (2001)",
    "Tsubakihara et al. (2012)",
    "Lancaster et al. (2005)a",
    "Lancaster et al. (2005)b",
    "Lancaster et al. (2005)c",
    "Harbaum et al. (2016)a",
    "Harbaum et al. (2016)b"
  ),
  Group = c(
    "—", "Testing – Autumn", "Testing – Spring", "—",
    "BEEP", "YYRL1",
    "Age 18", "Age 19", "Age 20", "Age 16", "Age 17",
    "—", "—",
    "Placebo", "6.4% CHO", "12.8% CHO",
    "IPAH", "Healthy"
  ),
  Design = c(
    "Pre–post", "Pre–post", "Pre–post", "Pre–post",
    "Pre–post", "Pre–post", "Pre–post", "Pre–post",
    "Pre–post", "Pre–post", "Pre–post",
    "Pre–post", "Pre–post",
    "Crossover", "Crossover", "Crossover",
    "Pre–post", "Pre–post"
  ),
  N = c(
    "7 men", "14 men", "14 men", "3 men",
    "31 men", "31 men",
    "16 men", "16 men", "16 men", "16 men", "16 men",
    "9 men", "18 women",
    "7 men", "7 men", "7 men",
    "16 (12w, 4m)", "10 (6w, 4m)"
  ),
  Age = c(
    "28", "18.71 ± 0.99", "16.79 ± 0.58", "30",
    "17.87 ± 1.71", "17.90 ± 2.75",
    "18", "19", "20", "16", "17",
    "30", "NA",
    "25", "25", "25",
    "58", "58"
  ),
  BMI = c(
    "NA", "21.6", "21.5", "23",
    "22.29 ± 1.30", "21.7 ± 0.99",
    "19.28", "19.44", "20.49", "21.91", "21.54",
    "NA", "21.68",
    "NA", "NA", "NA",
    "25", "24"
  ),
  `Training status` = c(
    "NA", "Trained", "Trained", "Trained",
    "Trained", "Trained",
    "Trained", "Trained", "Trained", "Trained", "Trained",
    "Endurance trained", "Trained soccer players",
    "Endurance trained", "Endurance trained", "Endurance trained",
    "Untrained", "Untrained"
  ),
  VO2max = c(
    "4.9 l/min", "60.8", "62.2", "NA",
    "NA", "NA",
    "61.88 ± 4.25", "60.73 ± 4.57", "60.26 ± 3.34", "61.25 ± 4.31", "60.15 ± 3.6",
    "60.1 ml/kg/min", "NA",
    "59.2", "59.2", "59.2",
    "15", "23"
  ),
  `Exercise type` = c(
    "1.5 h downhill running at 75% VO2max",
    "Progressive treadmill test to exhaustion",
    "Progressive treadmill test to exhaustion",
    "Progressive treadmill test to exhaustion",
    "Beep test (20 m shuttle, start 8.5 km/h)",
    "YYRL1 (2×20 m shuttles, start 10 km/h)",
    "Progressive treadmill test to exhaustion",
    "Progressive treadmill test to exhaustion",
    "Progressive treadmill test to exhaustion",
    "Progressive treadmill test to exhaustion",
    "Progressive treadmill test to exhaustion",
    "2.5 h running at 75% VO2max",
    "2 h soccer match",
    "2.5 h cycling at 65% VO2max (placebo)",
    "2.5 h cycling at 65% VO2max (6.4% CHO)",
    "2.5 h cycling at 65% VO2max (12.8% CHO)",
    "CPET (10 W/min increment)",
    "CPET (10 W/min increment)"
  ),
  Fasted = c(
    "NA", "NA", "NA", "NA", "NA", "NA",
    "NA", "NA", "NA", "NA", "NA",
    "Yes", "No",
    "Yes", "Yes", "Yes",
    "NA", "NA"
  ),
  `Analysis method` = c(
    "Flow cytometry, intracellular IFN-γ & IL-4",
    "Th1/Th2/Th17 Phenotyping Kit",
    "Th1/Th2/Th17 Phenotyping Kit",
    "Th1/Th2/Th17 Phenotyping Kit",
    "Th1/Th2/Th17 Phenotyping Kit",
    "Th1/Th2/Th17 Phenotyping Kit",
    "Th1/Th2/Th17 Phenotyping Kit",
    "Th1/Th2/Th17 Phenotyping Kit",
    "Th1/Th2/Th17 Phenotyping Kit",
    "Th1/Th2/Th17 Phenotyping Kit",
    "Th1/Th2/Th17 Phenotyping Kit",
    "Flow cytometry, intracellular IFN-γ & IL-4",
    "Flow cytometry: CD4+CXCR3+ (Th1), CD4+CCR4+ (Th2)",
    "Intracellular IFN-γ & IL-4, CD4+",
    "Intracellular IFN-γ & IL-4, CD4+",
    "Intracellular IFN-γ & IL-4, CD4+",
    "Flow cytometry: CXCR3+/CCR4−/CCR6− (Th1), CXCR3−/CCR4+/CCR6− (Th2)",
    "Flow cytometry: CXCR3+/CCR4−/CCR6− (Th1), CXCR3−/CCR4+/CCR6− (Th2)"
  ),
  `Data source` = c(
    "Plot", "Raw data", "Raw data", "Plot",
    "Raw data", "Raw data",
    "Raw data", "Raw data", "Raw data", "Raw data", "Raw data",
    "Plot", "Table",
    "Table", "Table", "Table",
    "Plot", "Plot"
  ),
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

kable(
  study_chars,
  align = c("c", "l", "l", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c", "l", "c", "l", "c")
)
```
